name: mismatch-auditor
description: Intent auditor: blocks bash commands that mismatch the agent's stated intent via external LLM verification (Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama)

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
openrouter_api_key.description: Optional fallback. Get one at https://openrouter.ai

threshold.title: Mismatch threshold
threshold.description: Score 0.0-1.0, commands above this are blocked. Default: 0.7

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: debug / info / warn / error / silent. Default: warn
